content: <1>The lifetime is set.</1> The secret key will be deactivated after: {{days}} days

comment.text: This translation key controls the message displayed to users when setting the lifetime of an API secret key, indicating how long after activation the secret will expire. The value is a count of days and appears in a dialog window where users can set the API key's lifetime.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The closing tag </1> is missing in the Azerbaijani translation.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: <1>İstifadə müddəti təyin olunub.</1> Gizli açar {{days}} gündən sonra deaktiv ediləcək

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The closing tag </1> is missing in the Finnish translation.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: <1>Käyttöikä on asetettu</1> Secret key poistuu käytöstä: {{days}} päivän jälkeen

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The closing tag </1> is placed before the period, but the period is outside the tag in English. However, more critically, there is an extra period after the closing tag </1> in the French translation that does not exist in the English source (English: '</1> The secret...', French: '</1>. La clé...'). While this is punctuation, the structural placement of the tag relative to the sentence flow is slightly altered.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: <1>La durée de vie est fixée.</1> La clé secrète sera désactivée après : {{days}} jours

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The closing tag </1> is missing or improperly placed, causing a mismatch with the opening tag <1>.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: <1>De levensduur is ingesteld.</1> De secret key wordt gedeactiveerd na: {{days}} dagen

ai_spell_check_issues.description: There is a missing space between the closing tag </1> and the start of the next sentence, which affects the visual layout/spacing compared to the English source.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: <1>O tempo de vida está definido.</1> A chave secreta será desactivada depois: {{days}} dias

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The phrase 'va fi dezactivată timp de: {{days}} zile' means 'will be deactivated for: {{days}} days', which implies the duration of the deactivation state, rather than the point in time when it occurs. The English 'after: {{days}} days' indicates the expiration point.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: <1>Durată de viață este stabilită.</1> Cheia secretă va fi dezactivată după: {{days}} zile

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'කාලාව' (Kālāva) is grammatically incorrect/incomplete in Sinhala for 'lifetime'. It should be 'කාලසීමාව' (Kālasīmāva).
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: <1>කාලසීමාව නියමිතය.</1> රහස් යතුර {{days}} දිනකින් අක්‍රිය වනු ඇත.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Slovak translation uses the wrong grammatical case for the variable '{{days}}'. In Slovak, when specifying a duration after a preposition like 'po', the noun must be in the locative case ('dňoch'), not the genitive case ('dní').
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: <1>Doba platnosti je nastavená.</1> Tajný kľúč bude deaktivovaný po: {{days}} dňoch
